headline.zh-CN: 副主催可完整协作专辑流程
headline.en: Co-producers can fully assist album workflows

summary.zh-CN: 副主催现在会在专辑、曲目、工作流和提交页面获得与后端权限一致的协作入口，同时社团危险区会正确保留所有权边界。
summary.en: Co-producers now get album, track, workflow, and submission controls that match backend permissions, while circle danger-zone ownership boundaries remain enforced.

title.zh-CN: 专辑与曲目入口不再漏掉副主催
title.en: Album and track entry points no longer omit co-producers

description.zh-CN: 副主催可以看到可管理的社团专辑，进入专辑设置，处理曲目侧主催流程、评审分配、外部曲师代传和成品导出。
description.en: Co-producers can see managed circle albums, enter album settings, handle producer-side track workflow controls, manage reviewer assignments, proxy-submit for external composers, and export completed albums.

title.zh-CN: 社团危险区区分协作与所有权
title.en: Circle danger zone separates collaboration from ownership

description.zh-CN: 副主催在社团危险区只会看到离开社团操作；删除社团仍仅限所有者或管理员。
description.en: Co-producers now see only the leave-circle action in the danger zone; deleting a circle remains limited to owners or administrators.
